summary: Fixed viewport fill on mobile/tablets by: (1) adding canvas CSS style overrides (width/height: 100%) after setSize() in scene.ts and main.ts so resolutionScale only affects the backing store pixel ratio, never layout; (2) refactoring resize.ts to use visualViewport API with innerWidth/innerHeight fallback, plus orientationchange and visualViewport resize listeners with proper cleanup; (3) updating style.css with dvh/dvw units (vh/vw fallback), canvas 100% !important, and safe-area-inset env() on UI buttons; (4) adding viewport-fit=cover to index.html meta tag. All 411 tests pass including 21 new viewport tests.
